context.summary: Complete an electrical circuit with your body, your friendsâ bodies, and your BBC micro:bit.
how_it_works: Two crocodile clip leads are attached to the micro:bitâs ground pin and pin 1.
You hold the other ends of the leads with both hands to allow an electrical current to flow through you, or do the same with a group of friends holding hands.
When the circuit is complete, a stick figure appears on the micro:bitâs LED display and a sound plays.
